[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 011100101 5
1 001100101 4
2 100010000 2
3 000001111 4
4 011100101 5
5 001100101 4
6 100010000 2
7 000000000 a

12 21 001100101 4 match 1 5
23 32 001010001 3
34 43 100010001 3
45 54 000101101 4
56 65 011101101 6
67 76 110101000 4
70 07 010001010 3

13 31 001000001 2

35 53 001000001 2

57 75 010101000 3

71 17 010100010 3

36 63 101000001 3
47 74 100111010 5

61 16 011100101 5 match 0 4
72 27 000110000 2

15 51 011100101 5 match 0 4
26 62 001100101 4 match 1 5
37 73 100010000 2 match 2 6
